{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Subspace prison
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A [[Subspace prison]] is described as airless and timeless.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
